name: Renee Runyon
body: Thank you for your transparency in your spiritual awakening. I am grateful for my own life crisis which brought the Ultimate Choice (doing life with/without God) before my face. You are so right that everything worship-related is richer, deeper, more meaningful after an encounter with God Almighty. May you have the best Easter ever as you use your Levitical gifts in the privilege of leading worship. Glory to God!!!

name: michael tarvin
body: So many answers to prayers! His blessings continue, both physical and spiritual. He is definitely alive and his Holy Spirit is moving in your life and your family's. Praise Him and thank you for overflowing with the testimony of his love and truth as revealed in you. ❤️🤲🙏🏼

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: So grateful to read this update this morning. Pray that all continues to move forward as Lyla backs off the drugs.

name: Julie Thornton
body: Love all of the healing in this. God truly is a skilled miracle maker.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: beautiful...I would have been crying with you. How did Kayla make it through that song with you crying? lol

name: Kathy Laub
body: Thank you so much for all of this!❤️🙏

name: Judy Nichols
body: This is a beautiful testimony, Lee.
